chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-204 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 27-08-2025 M/s Shabbir Ali Bozdar & Badaruddin Memon, Advocates along with petitioner. M/s Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G and Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G a/w SIP Rehmatullah, SHO, P.S, Halani. **** Through instant petition, petitioner seeks directions to the official respondents to take hectic efforts for arrest of proclaimed offenders in Crime No.153 of 2024, registered at P.S, Halani under sections 302, 324 etc PPC. Pursuant to order dated 13.08.2025, trial Court has furnished progress report. Today, learned APG also files status of case, which reflects that charge has been framed and matter is now fixed for recording evidence. Learned Law Officers submit that the trial Court has already concluded proceedings under Sections 87 and 88, Cr.P.C., whereby the absconding accused have been declared proclaimed offenders. They further submit that the official respondents shall continue to make all possible efforts to effect the arrest of the proclaimed offenders in the aforesaid crime. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that for further proceedings, as provided under the law including blockage of CNICs of proclaimed offenders, the petitioner will approach the trial Court. Once 2 such an application is filed, same shall be dealt with expeditiously by the trial Court in accordance with law. In view of the above statements and directions, learned counsel for the petitioner, being satisfied, seeks the disposal of the present petition.

Once 2 such an application is filed, same shall be dealt with expeditiously by the trial Court in accordance with law. In view of the above statements and directions, learned counsel for the petitioner, being satisfied, seeks the disposal of the present petition. Accordingly, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to the respondents No.3&4 to look into the matter and to ensure arrest of proclaimed offenders in the above by taking concrete effective measures. JUDGE Ahmad
